content.en:
Kazekogawa.

Ye Tian turned on the copying talent from time to time to explore the surrounding situation, although the innate eternal life was not completely born, the talent was not obvious, he might not be able to detect it, but there must be many eternal tribulation clans stationed near the innate eternal life.

Therefore, it is also useful for him to probe in this way.

However, the Fugu River is too big, and this way of looking for it will take a long time.

During this period, Ye Tian was also discovered by the Eternal Tribulation Clan, although he did not carry that powerful finger of the Eternal Realm, he still showed not weak combat power and terrifying recovery ability and life-saving ability, even if he was surrounded by many Sixfold Realm Eternal Tribulation Clan, he could easily escape.

And as the news of the Innate Eternal Life spread, a large number of Supreme Beings poured into the Wind Ancient River, which brought tremendous pressure to the Eternal Tribulation Clan for a while.

A large number of Eternal Tribulations were slaughtered, becoming the harvest of the Supreme One.

At the same time, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor of the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain was in a hurry.

If this situation continues, I am afraid that the Fenggu River will be lost.

In that case, the price paid by the Eternal Tribulation would be in vain.

Whoa!!

A half-step Eternal Tribulation Eternal Tribulation Clan appeared in front of the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor, including the first half-step Eternal Realm of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, the Heavenly Tribulation Tribulation Ancestor.

"I've seen the Catastrophe Tribulation Ancestor!"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor said respectfully.

As soon as the Celestial Tribulation Ancestor came, he asked: "Tianxu, does Feng Guhe have an innate eternal life? The battle of Feng Guhe was completely a plan initiated by you, and we didn't ask about it, but this time the Eternal Tribulation Clan suffered a lot of losses, and it is rumored that Feng Guhe has an innate eternal life born, so I have to come and ask you." "

The other half-step Eternal Realms were also waiting for the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor's answer.

After a moment of silence, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor replied, "Yes!"

He didn't dare to lie, otherwise the Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor would definitely be able to find out, after all, the power of the Natural Calamity Tribulation Ancestor was greater than him, and if he gave an order, the situation of Fengguhe would inevitably appear in front of him.

Therefore, he can only answer truthfully.

"The matter of innate eternal life is very important, but you should consult with me!" said the Heavenly Calamity Ancestor coldly.

"Yes!"

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor lowered his head, not daring to refute.

"Forget it, you didn't do anything wrong in this matter, if you are anyone, it is necessary to completely conquer the Wind Ancient River at the moment, and you must not let the innate eternal life be exposed. At present, the outside world only suspects, but there is no definite evidence. The Ancestor of the Natural Calamity said.

Subsequently, the Ancestor of the Cataclysm issued an order to send more Eternal Tribulation Clans into the Fenggu River, and all kinds of powerful treasures were bestowed, and it was decided to preserve the Innate Eternal Life at all costs.

With a large number of Eternal Tribulations supporting the Wind Ancient River, an even greater war began.

The entire Fenggu River turned into a huge battlefield, which made it difficult for Su He to find innate eternal life.

At this time, even if he copied the body of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, he would not be able to find the Innate Eternal Life.

Because there must be very few Eternal Tribulation Clans who know the innate eternal life, perhaps only a few Eternal Tribulation Clans know about the entire Fenggu River.

"Look for it slowly and see your luck!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As the years passed, the battle in the Wind Ancient River became more and more serious, Ye Tian gained a lot, and another Wind Source Gold Crystal vein appeared, and Ye Tian also snatched a little Wind Source Gold Crystal again.

In the blink of an eye, a dark time passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's copy body detected some Eternal Tribulation Ancestors.

These Eternal Tribulations are located at the bottom of the Wind Ancient River, and they are very concentrated.

Even if he had come here, the Eternal Tribulation had not done anything to him.

Moreover, these Eternal Tribulation Clans are very secretive, and if he didn't have to copy his talent to investigate, he wouldn't know that there were Eternal Tribulation Clans here.

"Could it be here?"

Ye Tian guessed.

He was going to go down and take a look, even if the replica body fell, it wouldn't be a big deal.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled to the bottom of the Fenggu River and sensed a large array.

This large array covered an area at the bottom of the Fenggu River, which made it impossible to spy on the situation here.

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and immediately attacked this big array.

Thundered!!!!!

With just one blow, the great array shattered.

After all, this kind of concealed array can't have a strong defense, and if the defense is too strong, it will be easy to be discovered.

When the great array shattered, the angry gazes of the two Eternal Tribulators came.

The next moment, they made a move on Ye Tian.

As soon as they fought, Ye Tian was completely suppressed.

These two Eternal Tribulation Clan are very powerful, not weaker than the top Void Divine Son, and they are definitely not too far from the Void Lord who broke through the third layer of the Void Tower, and they are definitely the top geniuses of the Eternal Tribulation Clan in this era.

When the battle was fighting, Ye Tian spied on the situation here.

He sensed a majestic breath of life, incomparably rich, and exuding a supreme eternal aura.

"It turned out to be really an innate eternal life, although it was not conceived, but it will not be far from the day when it was conceived!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Now.

The two Eternal Tribulation Clans were also nervous, and the other Eternal Tribulation Clans were not strong enough to help.

They were able to defeat Ye Tian, but Ye Tian's life-saving ability was too terrifying.

"He's hard to kill, don't kill him, seal him!"

The two Eternal Tribulations decided.

Ye Tian knew very well that it would be difficult for him to escape, after all, these two Eternal Tribulation Clans were really powerful, so he didn't make much resistance, and soon let the two Eternal Tribulation Clans seal him.

Of course, Ye Tian could annihilate this replica body by himself at any time.

However, he did not do so.

"The innate eternal life has not been completely born, even if I let the copy body with that powerful finger of the Eternal Realm and destroy these two people, there is no way to completely occupy this place, and then the Eternal Tribulation Clan will definitely send a large number of clansmen to besiege me, it is better to wait until the last moment and let the copy body come over!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Eternal Tribulation Clan sealed Ye Tian, thinking that the problem was solved, and immediately began to re-establish the formation and hide here.

Time passed slowly like this-

The Eternal Tribulation Clan was also very anxious, because the day of the birth of the Innate Eternal Life was getting closer and closer, and if it was not able to completely occupy the Fenggu River, then the day of the birth of the Innate Eternal Life would attract the attention of a large number of Supreme People.

At that time, the Eternal Tribulation Clan was afraid that they would have to pay a very heavy price to have any hope of taking away the innate eternal life, and they might not even be able to succeed.

this day.

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor and the Heavenly Tribulation Ancestor started a meeting.

They have a new plan!
